name: Kiss that Kills
overview: A mysterious woman appears in front of Otaro Dojima. The mysterious woman has a pale face with red lips. She kisses him and he dies, but the next moment he regains consciousness. He realizes he is now seven days in the past. The mysterious woman also follows him. Due to her kiss, Otaro Dojima dies and goes back to the past over and over again.

trailers.title: Todome No Kiss Japanese Drama 2018 || Kiss That Kills || Trailer HD
